channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump Accuses China of Election Interference, Sparks Diplomatic Tensions
item.description: President Donald Trump has accused China of interfering in the 2020 U.S. election, a claim that has reignited tensions in the already fragile U.S.-China relationship. During a televised speech, Trump ...

item.title: BBC and ITV Pundits Clash Over 2026 World Cup Commentary Rights Amid Managerial Controversy
item.description: The article explores the anticipated rivalry between BBC and ITV for broadcasting rights to the 2026 FIFA World Cup, highlighting the absence of Gary Lineker from ITV's commentary team. It also discus...

item.title: School costs strain families, with grandparents stepping in to help
item.description: A new report reveals that over half of families with children at private schools or considering enrollment face significant financial pressure due to rising education costs. Independent Schools Austra...

item.title: Former Richard Stallman Colleague Advocates for Open-Source AI Models
item.description: David Siegel, a former colleague of Richard Stallman, argues in a Fortune article that the AI industry must prioritize open-source models to prevent knowledge from being locked away by corporations. S...

item.title: Wangchuk Ji Hospitalized Before Parliament March, Investigation Discontinued
item.description: The article discusses the cancellation of an investigation into the CJP (Congress of People's Justice) parliamentary march following the hospitalization of its leader, Sonam Wangchuk. Wangchuk, who wa...

item.title: NBI Director to Testify in VP Sara Duterte's Impeachment Probe
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) Director Melvin Matibag is set to testify before the impeachment court, providing critical details about the agency’s probe into Vice President Sara Duterte’...

item.title: NCDMB and Renaissance Launch Oil and Gas Training for 300 Nigerians
item.description: The Nigerian Content Development Management Board (NCDMB) and Renaissance Africa Energy Company have partnered to launch a comprehensive training program for 300 Nigerian professionals in the oil and ...

item.title: KZN wildlife agency plans lion branding initiative to manage human-wildlife conflict
item.description: Ezemvelo KZN Wildlife is set to discuss a lion branding initiative aimed at addressing the rising concerns of human-wildlife conflict in KwaZulu-Natal, particularly in communal areas. As lion sighting...

item.title: Church microfinance program boosts women's economic independence in Zanzibar
item.description: The Catholic Diocese of Zanzibar has launched a micro-credit initiative targeting women entrepreneurs in North B District, providing interest-free loans and business training to foster financial self-...

item.title: Choosing Freedom: A Memoir of Self-Discovery and Divorce
item.description: Deborah Santana's memoir recounts her 34-year marriage to Carlos Santana, a decision she made to reclaim her identity and prioritize her own growth. The article highlights her journey of self-discover...

item.title: Sue Ramirez and 'Tropang Gabo' Bring Excitement and Drama to 'Coco Martin’s Sigabo'
item.description: The article discusses the upcoming TV series 'Coco Martin’s Sigabo,' starring Sue Ramirez and the group 'Tropang Gabo.' The show is expected to deliver intense action sequences, compelling drama, and ...

item.title: US NRC Proposes Weakening Radiation Protection Standards Amid Scientific Concerns
item.description: The article discusses the US Nuclear Regulatory Commission's (NRC) proposal to weaken radiation protection standards under President Trump's directive, despite scientific evidence indicating current s...

item.title: Naheed Nenshi's Apology for Meeting Israeli Ambassador Sparks Debate on Political Accountability
item.description: The article critiques Alberta Premier Rachel Notley's (later Naheed Nenshi) public apology for meeting Israeli Ambassador Iddo Moed, contrasting it with his earlier positive interactions at a Jewish c...

item.title: Scientists Identify Possible Causes of the Global Hum Phenomenon
item.description: A recent study published in PLOS ONE by researchers at the Norwegian University of Science and Technology (NTNU) suggests that the global hum—a low-frequency sound perceived by some people worldwide—m...

item.title: Pakistani Security Forces Respond to Afghan Taliban Attacks on Kurram Border Posts
item.description: Pakistani security forces launched a full-scale retaliatory operation against the Afghan Taliban following unprovoked attacks on border posts in Kurram. The Taliban used heavy weapons, mortars, and ot...

item.title: Translator Daisy Rockwell discusses translation, Partition literature, Palestine, and the enduring influence of AK Ramanujan
item.description: In an extensive interview with Scroll, International Booker Prize-winning translator Daisy Rockwell reflects on her work as a translator, writer and artist, explaining how themes such as Partition, co...

item.title: Hawthorn Hawks dominate Richmond in AFL clash
item.description: Hawthorn delivered a crushing 70-point victory over Richmond at the MCG, propelling them back into the top four of the AFL ladder. Uncontracted forward Mitch Lewis starred with five goals, while Nick ...

item.title: Hockey Remains Canada's Favorite Sport Despite FIFA World Cup Exposure, Survey Shows
item.description: A recent Leger survey conducted for the Association of Canadian Studies reveals that hockey remains Canada's most popular sport despite the increased global attention on the FIFA World Cup. The survey...

item.title: Speaker Of House Denies Rift With Kaduna Governor, Vows Continued Collaboration
item.description: Speaker of the House, Abbas Tajudeen, has officially denied rumors of a rift with Kaduna State Governor Uba Sani, assuring supporters and residents of Zaria that their partnership remains strong. The ...

item.title: Potential Tropical Cyclone May Intensify Habagat Ahead of Weekend
item.description: A potential tropical cyclone is expected to enhance the Habagat, a seasonal weather phenomenon in the Philippines, as it approaches towards the weekend. The development of this cyclone could lead to i...
